description: An object that indicates position or direction; something that shows the way. 'Siru' names what points forward—the placed indicator that guides journey.
sound_symbolism: The word signals clear. 'Si' points with precise indication, direction shown. Then 'ru' runs along the route, path marked.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'siru keiro shelo.' (the marker signifies the way). For trail markers, boundary stones, any indicator of place or direction. Related to 'kiroa' (sign) but less communicative.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Markers on the path—signs of progress, indicators that practice is moving forward.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Markers guided travelers—stones, blazes, cairns showing the way through wilderness.
